name: Zhanjiang Guolian Aquatic Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhanjiang Guolian Aquatic Products Co., Ltd. operates in the aquaculture industry in China and internationally. The company offers fresh prawns/shrimps and fresh fish; and prepacked, fresh, and crumbed seafood products. It is also involved in the hatchery, factory farming, feed, and marine food processing activities. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhanjiang, China.
